events.message: P2 bond-loop execution slice: inspection, implementation, DeepSeek review, and verification logging completed.
Follow-up optimization pass: SharedUI animation and PikaAI SSE parsing reviewed and improved with DeepSeek MCP.
Enterprise-strict security/release gates implemented; awaiting CI/Xcode validation to clear remaining blockers.
Commercial optimization pass completed: deterministic secret-gate checks, privacy mirror purge, and subscription conversion surfaces added to onboarding/settings.
Autonomous conversion iteration completed: pet-cap gating, engagement-triggered paywalls, and subscription analytics instrumentation across settings/home/chat.
Checkpoint emitted after adding entitlement-refresh and paywall-cooldown safeguards to reduce duplicate prompts and subscriber mis-gating.
Autonomous 3-hour orchestrator framework implemented with runtime loop, DeepSeek policy hooks, expert-wave routing, and scheduled CI runner artifacts.
